heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 11280 Authorization of appropriations

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: 1 Authorization
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subchapter (other than part E) $127,421,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2020.

children.heading: Parts A and B
children.label: A Parts A and B
children.text: From the amount appropriated under paragraph (1) for a fiscal year, the Secretary shall reserve not less than 90 percent to carry out parts A and B.

children.heading: Part B
children.label: B Part B
children.text: Of the amount reserved under subparagraph (A), 45 percent and, in those fiscal years in which continuation grant obligations and the quality and number of applicants for parts A and B warrant not more than 55 percent, shall be reserved to carry out part B.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: In each fiscal year, after reserving the amounts required by paragraph (2), the Secretary shall use the remaining amount (if any) to carry out parts C and D (other than ).section 11245 of this title

children.heading: Periodic estimate
children.label: B Periodic estimate
children.text: Of the amount authorized to be appropriated under paragraph (1), such sums as may be necessary shall be made available to carry out for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2020.section 11245 of this title

children.heading: Part E
children.label: 4 Part E
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out part E $25,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2020.

children.heading: Separate identification required
children.label: b Separate identification required
children.text: No funds appropriated to carry out this subchapter may be combined with funds appropriated under any other Act if the purpose of combining such funds is to make a single discretionary grant, or a single discretionary payment, unless such funds are separately identified in all grants and contracts and are used for the purposes specified in this subchapter.
